attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT RANK() OVER(
   ORDER BY  XAL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT ) + SDCAKEY.MAX_VAL XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,   
   XAL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
   USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
   FROM
   (
   SEL COALESCE(MAX(MAXKEY.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY),0)  MAX_VAL FROM (
   SELECT MAX(SMRAB.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY) XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE SMRAB
   UNION ALL
     SELECT  MAX(SMRA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY) XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY  
   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE SMRA  
   )MAXKEY ) SDCAKEY, 
   $$STGDB.WI_XLA_NRS_OA_INCR XAL
   WHERE 
   NOT EXISTS ( 
   SELECT 1 
   FROM  $$ETLVWDB.SM_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE SMRA 
   WHERE   XAL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = SMRA.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT )

SELECT
AE_HEADER_ID
,AE_LINE_NUM
,APPLICATION_ID
,FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONVERSION_DT
,GL_DATE
,LEDGER_ID
,FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT
,FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT
,ACCT_CLASS_CD
,ATTRIBUTE3
,SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT
,SK_TRX_ID_INT
,ATTRIBUTE7
,OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT
,CODE_COMBINATION_ID
,CURRENCY_CODE
,TRXL_CREDIT_AMT
,TRXL_DEBIT_AMT
,DIST_TYPE
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_DUR_CNT
,BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT
,ORDER_QUANTITY
,ATTRIB_PCT
,TRANSACTION_SOURCE
,TRX_CLASS
,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
,SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,DEAL_ID
,ATTRIBUTE4
,ATTRIB_CD
,SS_CD
,ATTRIBUTE13
,BUNDLE_TYPE
,PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID
,PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID
,ATTRIBUTE2
FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_XLA_NRS_OA_INCR EXLA
WHERE EXLA.EXCEPTION_TYPE ='RI'

SELECT
AE_HEADER_ID
,AE_LINE_NUM
,APPLICATION_ID
,FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONVERSION_DT
,GL_DATE
,LEDGER_ID
,FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT
,FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT
,ACCT_CLASS_CD
,ATTRIBUTE3
,SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT
,SK_TRX_ID_INT
,ATTRIBUTE7
,OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT
,CODE_COMBINATION_ID
,CURRENCY_CODE
,TRXL_CREDIT_AMT
,TRXL_DEBIT_AMT
--,DV_CREDIT_TRXNL_AMT
--,DV_DEBIT_TRXNL_AMT
,DIST_TYPE
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_DUR_CNT
,BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT
,ORDER_QUANTITY
,ATTRIB_PCT
,TRANSACTION_SOURCE
,TRX_CLASS
,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
,SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,DEAL_ID
,ATTRIBUTE4
,ATTRIB_CD
,SS_CD
,ATTRIBUTE13
,BUNDLE_TYPE
,PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID
,PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID
,ATTRIBUTE2
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_XLA_NRS_OA_INCR WIXLA
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE WRA
WHERE WRA.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT= WIXLA.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT )

SELECT 
SMRA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY AS NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY
,XAL_INCR.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT
,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,XAL_INCR.TRXL_CREDIT_AMT AS TRXL_CREDIT_AMT
,XAL_INCR.TRXL_DEBIT_AMT AS TRXL_DEBIT_AMT
,XAL_INCR.AE_HEADER_ID AS SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT
,XAL_INCR.AE_LINE_NUM AS  SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT
,XAL_INCR.SK_TRX_ID_INT AS SK_TRX_ID_INT
,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY AS AR_TRX_KEY
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,CASE WHEN XAL_INCR.ATTRIB_CD IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET') THEN PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AS  PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,XAL_INCR.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT AS FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT
,XAL_INCR.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT AS FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT
,CAST (XAL_INCR.FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONVERSION_DT AS DATE) GL_DT
,XAL_INCR.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRXL_CURR_CD
,XAL_INCR.FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONVERSION_DT AS FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONVERSION_DT
,XAL_INCR.ACCT_CLASS_CD AS ACCT_CLASS_CD
,COALESCE (XAL_INCR.ORDER_QUANTITY,0) AS PRDT_INVOICED_QTY
,XAL_INCR.DIST_TYPE AS REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD
,COALESCE(ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
,CAST (XAL_INCR.GL_DATE AS DATE) GL_POSTED_DT
,NP.ITEM_KEY AS BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY
,COALESCE(XAL_INCR.ATTRIBUTE7,-999) AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT         
,COALESCE(XAL_INCR.DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DEAL_ID
,COALESCE(XAL_INCR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,XAL_INCR.ATTRIB_CD AS  ATTRIB_CD
,CAST(XAL_INCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT AS DATE) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
,CAST(XAL_INCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT AS DATE) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT
,XAL_INCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DUR_CNT  AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_DUR_CNT
,CASE WHEN XAL_INCR.TRX_CLASS='CM' THEN COALESCE(XAL_INCR.OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT,NRSDL.OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT,-9999) ELSE COALESCE(XAL_INCR.OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT,-9999) END AS OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT
, CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE  ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%') )   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ ) THEN COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) ELSE
      COALESCE(NDEF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,DEF_RULE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) END  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AS AR_BATCH_SRC_KEY
,XAL_INCR.TRX_CLASS AS TRX_CLASS_CD
,XAL_INCR.SS_CD AS SS_CD
,COALESCE(XAL_INCR.ATTRIBUTE4,'UNKNOWN') AS SUBSCR_CD                 
,XAL_INCR.ATTRIB_PCT AS ATTRIB_PCT
,XAL_INCR.ATTRIBUTE13 AS TRX_SRC_CD                                            
,COALESCE(CASE WHEN (XAL_INCR.BUNDLE_TYPE='MULTIPLE Performance Obligations (MPOB)' AND XAL_INCR.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID IS NOT NULL AND XAL_INCR.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID IS NULL) THEN XAL_INCR.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID 
     ELSE XAL_INCR.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID END,-999) AS PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT
, CASE WHEN XAL_INCR.BUNDLE_TYPE='MULTIPLE Performance Obligations (MPOB)' THEN 'MPOB' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS POB_TYPE_CD
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,CASE WHEN NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(SELECT * FROM   $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_CNTRY_SLS_CREDIT_DEFAULT_TV WHERE BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = 'UNK' AND END_TV_DT='3500-01-01' 
      AND  UPPER(BK_TRX_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'REVLINE' ) DEF_RULE,
      $$STGDB.WI_XLA_NRS_OA_INCR  XAL_INCR
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE SMRA    ON (XAL_INCR.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = SMRA.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT)
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
      ON(XAL_INCR.ATTRIBUTE3=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID )
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
      ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = XAL_INCR.LEDGER_ID)
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
      ON (SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = XAL_INCR. CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AND 
      SAT.SS_CODE = XAL_INCR.SS_CD)
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
      ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
      ON (SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = XAL_INCR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
      AND SATL.SS_CODE = XAL_INCR.SS_CD)  
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
      ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
      
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
      ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
      ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA    
      ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = XAL_INCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID   
      AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NXOA
      ON NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY=SMRA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY  
      LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
      ON (CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
                 ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
                 END=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
      LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
      ON (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
      LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP  
      ON STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2               
      ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=COALESCE(STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,(SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP  WHERE SALES_COUNTRY_NAME='UNITED STATES'))
      AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
      
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CSTMR_ACCT_LOCATR_ASGN_TV ASGN
     ON NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = ASGN.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY 
     AND ASGN.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR_TV LOC
     ON ASGN.LOCATOR_KEY = LOC.LOCATOR_KEY 
     AND LOC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_CNTRY_SLS_CREDIT_DEFAULT_TV NDEF
     ON NDEF.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = LOC.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
     AND NDEF.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01'
     AND UPPER(NDEF.BK_TRX_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'REVLINE' 
      
     LEFT OUTER JOIN 
     (
      SELECT ST.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_XLA_NRS_OA_INCR ST
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REVENUE_EXT_SUB_V SUB_ALL
      ON ST.ATTRIBUTE2 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2   
      INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
      ON SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
	  AND EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_NAME ='CISCO OFFER ATTRIBUTION'
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
      ON (SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =COALESCE(EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID,-9999)
      AND SATL.SS_CODE = 'CG')  
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
      ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     ) PAR
      ON (PAR.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = XAL_INCR.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT)
  /*Added as part of Q1FY17 to derive OA_ATTRIB_ID of CM trx:thvarghe*/ 
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NRSDL
  WHERE NRSDL.REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD  ='REVENUE_SHARE'  GROUP BY 1,2) NRSDL
  ON COALESCE(XAL_INCR.ATTRIBUTE7,-999)=NRSDL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT
